findings: Judge flips the cc-vs-codex ranking: Gemini codex 0.770>cc 0.758; MiniMax cc 0.806>codex 0.737. agy clearly last under both.
Capability != consistency: codex extremely stable (meanSD 0.002) but not most capable; cc most capable under MiniMax but least consistent (0.077).
Refusal collapse: 0 appropriate refusals on sabotaged-data tasks - every response fabricated or partially hedged. codex fabricates 56%, cc 40%.
